Operator ratification of the protected AGENTS.md diff remains required before merge per the feature index intake record. Implement waves edited AGENTS.md and six Cursor rule projections (00-agents-md, tesseract-engineer, persona-designer, intake-analyst, tech-lead, tech-writer); supervisor.mdc was audited and kept as-is. Merge still requires explicit approval of the final AGENTS.md and mirrored .cursor/rules/*.mdc diffs.
